abilities.name: Arcane Reservoir
abilities.text: Crews containing one or more models with this ability increase their maximum hand size by one.

abilities.name: Remade Flesh
abilities.text: After a friendly Rusty Alyce, Trigger Happy is killed, this model may drain a (soulstone) to summon a Rusty Alyce, Trigger Happy into base contact with this model and then kill this model.

actions.name: Entropic Siphon
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.
actions.effects: An ally within range may heal an amount equal to the damage suffered.

actions.name: Warning Cry
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target another ally with an enemy within 6" of it. Move the target up to 3".

triggers.name: Roll and Shoot
triggers.text: Once per activation. The target may declare a (gun) action.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.
